title: Discovery and engineering of ribosomally synthesized and post-translationally modified peptide (RiPP) natural products

traditional_methods.bioactivity_guided_screening: Historical primary approach, now showing limitations
limitations: Most RiPP biosynthetic gene clusters (BGCs) are inactive under laboratory culture conditions
Limited knowledge of most microbial communities
Reaching practical limits due to expressed molecule limitations

modern_genomics_based_approaches.genome_mining: Bottom-up approach using gene-based big data methods
advantages: More rationalized and systematic than bioactivity screening
Access to silent or minimally expressed molecules
Enables heterologous expression and production without reliance on cultivation
tools_evolution: Recent: Machine learning and neural network algorithms for unconventional BGCs

genome_mining_discoveries_table.novel_finding: Narrow-spectrum sactibiotic effective against B. cereus and L. monocytogenes
Improved water solubility vs darobactin; effective in mouse infection models
Distinct solubility and protein binding profiles
AviCys-containing; potent against MRSA and VRE
New RiPP class with unique structure

radical_sam_enzymes.description: Diverse rSAM enzymes associated with various RiPP maturases
radical_sam_enzymes.function: Reductively cleave SAM to form 5'-deoxyadenosyl radical
applications: Sactipeptide biosynthesis - S-to-alpha carbon crosslink formation
Darobactin analog mining using DarE enzyme
advanced_methods: SPECO workflow - identified 32,220 rSAM-based RiPP BGCs

atp_grasp_ligase.function: Catalyzes cyclization with multiple rings interconnected by o-ester/o-amide bonds
atp_grasp_ligase.discovery_scale: 5275 homologous proteins identified from 4 known ATP-grasp ligases
atp_grasp_ligase.results: 9 new graspetide groups with novel core sequences
atp_grasp_ligase.validation: RODEO filtering yielded 3923 high-confidence graspetide BGCs
atp_grasp_ligase.novel_graspetide: Thatisin from Lysobacter antibioticus - features rare Asp14-Pro15 amide isomerism

cysteine_decarboxylase.mining_approach: BLAST search of MibD from microbisporicin biosynthesis
cysteine_decarboxylase.bioactivity: Potent against Gram-positive bacteria including MRSA and VRE

initial_discovery.significance: First antibiotic effective against Gram-negative bacteria since 1960

analog_discovery.darobactin_b_f: Darobactins with 1-2 amino acid differences from core sequence

darobactin_b.activity: Slightly more effective on A. baumannii isolates

improvements: Improved water solubility compared to darobactin
Efficacy in systemic E. coli infection in mouse models

advanced_mining.gene_target: DarE with additional genes (darG, darF, darH)
advanced_mining.darh_enzyme: FAD-dependent oxidoreductase and new flavin-dependent halogenase
advanced_mining.properties: Distinct solubility and plasma protein binding profiles with greater effectiveness than darobactin A

ripp_classes_and_characteristics.key_feature: Multiple rings interconnected by o-ester or o-amide bonds

ripp_classes_and_characteristics.mining_hallmark: a/b hydrolase fold proteins and horizontally transferred transmembrane helix (HTTH) proteins

limitations_of_genome_mining: Generally confined to known RiPP classes due to similarity-based searches
PTM enzymes often share significant homology with enzymes in other metabolic pathways
Can yield products unrelated to RiPPs
Requires continuous refinement of mining hallmarks

advancing_mining_strategies.ptm_enzyme_hallmarks: Identification of specific PTM enzyme families to locate RiPP families
advancing_mining_strategies.precursor_peptide_hallmarks: Novel gene mining approaches for precursor peptides
advancing_mining_strategies.combined_approaches: Integration of multiple genetic element co-occurrence patterns
advancing_mining_strategies.machine_learning: Neural network algorithms for unconventional BGCs prediction

key_insights: Bioactivity-guided screening now showing diminishing returns
Genome mining combined with heterologous expression is driving novel RiPP discovery
Silent BGCs in microbial genomes represent vast untapped potential
Structural diversity of RiPPs determined by PTM enzymes and precursor peptide sequences
Machine learning improving discovery of non-conventional RiPP structures
Integration of multiple mining strategies increases discovery success
